items.title: Add `Hephaestus Seal` pre-promotion policy: artifact must pass provenance verification before promotion.
Add `Arsenal Dock` release lane: batch PRs for timed merge windows with precomputed compatibility checks.
Ensure every required CI workflow listens to both `pull_request` and `merge_group` for queue parity.
Add an always-run required-check sentinel to avoid skipped-but-required deadlocks.
Set strict required status checks for `main` in high-concurrency waves.
Require successful deployment to a `staging` environment before merge to protected branches.
Enforce environment required reviewers with prevent-self-review for promotion jobs.
Enable ruleset-level required code-scanning results for protected branches.
Add ruleset path/file-size restrictions for high-risk locations and oversized artifacts.
Require linear history on protected branches and align merge method policy.
Pilot signed-commit enforcement on the most sensitive branch set first, then expand.
If self-hosted runners are introduced, require runner groups and private-repo-only policy from day zero.
Pin required status checks to the intended GitHub App source.
Add `Master Bench` CODEOWNERS policy for workflow and gate-script paths.
Add merge-queue timeout triage playbook linked to PR removal reasons.
Submit build-time dependency snapshots to GitHub Dependency Graph on every CI run.
Add SBOM generation and snapshot submission (`CycloneDX`/`SPDX`) as a policy-review artifact.
Add a reusable workflow for “forge gates” and call it from all primary pipelines to remove drift.
Add runner scale-set readiness plan for peak 8+ agent periods (even if using hosted runners today).
If self-hosted is adopted, enforce ephemeral-job runners and forbid long-lived shared runner state.
Add script-injection lint check for workflow files (untrusted context to shell sink patterns).
Add transactional outbox semantics to campaign-event writes (`write + publish` atomicity) where dual-write risk exists.
Add consumer idempotency ledger for campaign/event processors with replay-safe semantics.
Wrap external API/tool calls in explicit circuit-breaker policy during campaign loops.
Use Little’s Law to set lane WIP limits from observed throughput and lead-time metrics.
Move low-priority eval expansion jobs to OpenAI Batch API queue for cost and rate headroom.
Add AI RMF-based risk register for autonomous campaign features (`Govern/Map/Measure/Manage` tags per campaign).
Add `Daedalus Diagram` for each campaign: planned path, fallback branches, and escape hatch.
Add `Hermes Relay` handoff packet standard for cross-lane baton passes.
Add attestation lifecycle pruning job for stale/untrusted subjects.
Enable immutable releases for promotion-ready artifacts and enforce draft-first publish flow.
Add release integrity verification (`gh release verify` and `gh release verify-asset`) to promotion runbook.
Restrict reusable workflow sharing to a dedicated “Toolsmith” repo and document log-visibility caveats.
Group Dependabot security updates by ecosystem/risk tier to reduce PR storms during active campaign waves.
Enforce enterprise/org Actions policy to require full SHA pinning and restrict external reusable workflows.
Instrument CI pipeline spans/logs with OpenTelemetry CICD semantic conventions.
Standardize CICD error taxonomy using `error.type` and mandatory run identifiers.
Use JetStream KV with TTL and watchers for lane-lease coordination in high-concurrency waves.
Apply JetStream dedupe IDs + double-ack patterns for critical campaign event delivery.
Add webhook signature verification as mandatory for any OpenAI async callback path.
Use `previous_response_id` conversation chaining for campaign loop continuity by default.
Add mandatory exponential backoff + jitter wrapper for OpenAI calls in loop scripts.
Separate OpenAI staging vs production projects and enforce per-project spend/rate caps in campaign policy.
Enable CodeQL analysis for GitHub Actions workflow files (`actions` language) in advanced setup.
Add policy gate for high-signal CodeQL Actions queries (`untrusted checkout`, `artifact poisoning`, `missing-workflow-permissions`).
Add explicit `workflow_run` trust boundary rule: treat downloaded artifacts/workspace as untrusted unless provenance-verified.
Define matrix `max-parallel` defaults per workflow class (`ci`, `nightly`, `policy`) and enforce via review checklist.
Require explicit `fail-fast` and `continue-on-error` declarations in every matrix job.
Add reusable-workflow depth cap policy (`<=3`) even though platform permits deeper nesting.
Add monthly inventory report of reusable workflow consumers and refs.
Add private-workflow sharing warning checklist to onboarding/runbook (log visibility + token scope implications).
For any self-hosted future, require `runs-on` group + labels in all jobs (no broad `self-hosted` only selector).
Default new NATS/JetStream consumers to pull mode for campaign workloads unless replay-only semantics are needed.
Use JetStream `AckSync` for critical side-effecting event processors.
Add poison-message policy for `MaxDeliver` exhaustion (alert + quarantine path).
Standardize OpenAI background-mode usage policy with explicit terminal-state polling and cancellation handling.
Add automatic `/responses/compact` trigger when loop context approaches threshold.
Default campaign loop state chaining to `previous_response_id` unless explicit conversation object is required.
Add per-project OpenAI budget alarms and hard caps in campaign preflight checks.
Tune dependency review policy file with `fail-on-scopes`, `fail-on-severity`, and package deny-groups for supply-chain guardrails.
Add custom deployment protection rule integration for promotion environments (service-health gate before deploy).
Enforce environment wait-timer + required-reviewer policy on all promotion jobs.
Require deployment branch/tag allowlists per environment (`release-*`, `hotfix-*` only for prod-like targets).
Add explicit “allow admin bypass = false” policy for guarded environments.
Add dedicated CodeQL Actions security workflow and treat critical findings as merge blockers.
Add “workflow artifact trust boundary” checklist item whenever `workflow_run` consumes artifacts.
Emit JetStream advisories into a retained ops stream and review weekly.
Define default consumer class policy: pull+durable for workers, ordered consumer only for analysis/replay.
Add JetStream redelivery policy baseline (`AckWait`, `MaxDeliver`) per campaign workload type.
Require Structured Outputs for terminal campaign reports and set `parallel_tool_calls: false` in schema-critical steps.
Add automatic compaction threshold policy for long-running campaign loops.
Add background-task timeout + cancellation SLO for async campaign tasks.
Add `Argus Watchtower` multi-signal promotion gate (CI pass + provenance pass + advisory health pass).
Add `Janus Gate` two-stage promotion policy (review gate then runtime health gate) with mandatory evidence artifact.
Add a mandatory “run summary contract” step in every workflow using `GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY`.
Add standardized annotation emission (`notice`/`warning`/`error`) for gate scripts.
Add a “rerun failed with debug” operator command snippet to runbook and campaign handoff packets.
Add “pause switch” policy for non-critical workflows using workflow disable/enable commands during incident windows.
Add a dedicated “workflow health board” doc section with badge links for core workflows (`ci`, `size-check`, `nightly`, `policy`).
Add cancellation-safe cleanup policy (`if: cancelled()`) for post-failure artifact hygiene steps.
Add an explicit visualization-graph checkpoint in triage runbook before deep log analysis.
Add “Foreman Bench” environment custom protection service that blocks deploy if JetStream advisories show instability.
Define JetStream consumer baseline profile by workload (`interactive`, `batch`, `critical`) with tuned `MaxAckPending`.
Adopt explicit redelivery backoff arrays (not implicit immediate redelivery) for long-running campaign tasks.
Add DLQ implementation policy based on JetStream `MaxDeliver` advisories and message sequence retrieval.
Use OpenAI prompt objects/versioning for canonical campaign prompts and keep version refs in approval packets.
Add `prompt_cache_key` policy per campaign family to improve cache hit consistency under parallel load.
Add compaction-and-resume playbook: compact context, persist checkpoint, resume with `previous_response_id`.
Add a suggestions-bin status governance gate to enforce per-item status and evidence references.
Add suggestions-bin report-sync gate (`--check`) to fail fast when committed report drifts from markdown source.
Add repo-local `pyproject.toml` to define Python toolchain and test/lint contracts.
Adopt `uv` lockfile-managed dependency installs for CI and local smoke workflows.
Add `ruff` lint/format gate in pre-commit and quality gates.
Add targeted strict type-checking (`mypy`/`pyright`) for control-plane critical modules.
Enforce branch coverage thresholds for critical script/plugin paths.
Add direct runtime unit suites for high-risk plugins (`workflow_engine`, `mcp_auth`, `gui_hub_connector`).
Add property-based tests for workflow state machine invariants (`pause/resume/schedule`).
Standardize JSON schema validation across generated report artifacts.
Add shared HTTP resilience policy (timeouts, retries, backoff) for external calls.
Refactor `scripts/validate_workspace_index.py` into modular subcommands with incremental mode.
